description: This Java class provides centralized exception handling for a Spring Boot REST API. It defines methods to handle various common exceptions such as illegal arguments, validation errors, malformed JSON, and illegal state, converting them into structured HTTP responses with error details.
external_methods: err instanceof FieldError fe ? fe.getField() : err.getObjectName()

classes.name: ApiExceptionHandler
classes.description: A Spring component annotated with @RestControllerAdvice that handles various exceptions thrown during API request processing and returns structured error responses.

methods.name: handleBadRequest
methods.description: Handles IllegalArgumentException by returning a 400 Bad Request with error details.

methods.name: handleValidation
methods.description: Handles validation errors from MethodArgumentNotValidException, providing detailed field error info in the response.

methods.name: handleBadJson
methods.description: Handles malformed JSON request bodies thrown as HttpMessageNotReadableException, returning a 400 Bad Request.

methods.name: handleServerError
methods.description: Handles IllegalStateException, returning a 500 Internal Server Error with a message.

calls: err instanceof FieldError fe ? fe.getField() : err.getObjectName()
